name: kntnt-text-skills
description: Writing, redlining, editing, and proofreading skills modelled on Thomas Barregren's style. Ships with language files for Swedish, British English, and American English; extensible with one file per additional language. The three review skills form a strict inheritance hierarchy — proofread ⊂ redline ⊂ edit. Includes context-loader skills for the writing rules, ABT, and PAC techniques.
